---
title: "Sport MVP"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
library(Stat2Data)

mvp.df <- read.csv("DSProject without Joe.csv")
mvp.df$TC <- mvp.df$YC+mvp.df$RC*2

mvp.lm <- lm(G ~ APP+SUB+TC, data = mvp.df)
summary(mvp.lm)

predictMVP <- function(y) {
    temp.df <- mvp.df[mvp.df$Year == y, ]

    players.df <- data.frame(Name = temp.df$Name, Points = double(60))

    for (index in 1:60) {
        players.df$Points[index] <- mvp.lm[[1]][1] + mvp.lm[[1]][2]*(temp.df$APP[index]) + mvp.lm[[1]][3]*(temp.df$SUB[index]) + mvp.lm[[1]][4]*(temp.df$TC[index])
    }

    return(players.df$Name[players.df$Points == max(players.df$Points)])
}

predictMVP("2023-2024")
predictMVP("2024-2025")
```
